query: SELECT name, role, agency, bio FROM actors ORDER BY role, name LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute SELECT name, role, agency, bio FROM actors ORDER BY role, name LIMIT 20;

rows.name: Mary Kandaras
rows.bio: Named in defendant's November 29, 2024 pro se sanctions motion alleging intimidation to cease direct communication.

rows.name: Galen Carrico
rows.bio: Appointed June 3, 2024 after APD conflict finding. Appeared at December 5, 2024 Young hearing. Filed second Young motion September 2024.

rows.name: Joel Merchant
rows.bio: Named in July 2025 substitution of attorney as counsel of record.

rows.name: Samuel Figueroa
rows.bio: Substituted in 2025. Moved to withdraw June 6, 2025 citing relationship breakdown and defendant's desire for self-representation. Withdrawal granted August 21, 2025.

rows.name: Gianna Verness
rows.bio: Named in Young-hearing and APD-conflict materials in 2024.

rows.name: Sydney Hutt
rows.bio: Substituted in January 2024. Requested Young hearing May 16, 2024. APD office relieved at May 30, 2024 Young hearing.

rows.name: Cooper Brinson
rows.agency: Washoe County Public Defender / Alternate Public Defender
rows.bio: Initial appointed counsel in CR23-0657. Associated with preliminary-hearing waiver. Arraignment minutes identify him as appointed counsel.

rows.name: Amos Stege
rows.bio: Filed September 26, 2025 notice of bail-condition violation alleging defendant email to Merchant constituted a threat.

rows.name: Aziz Merchant
rows.bio: Lead prosecutor in CR23-0657. Appeared at December 5, 2024 Young hearing. Filed or associated with multiple State motions including contempt motion (Jan 2025).

rows.name: Dianne S. Drinkwater
rows.bio: Identified by Master Evidence Index as DDA on original Reno Justice Court criminal complaint (March 2023).

rows.name: Nicole Hicks
rows.bio: Appears in 2025 prosecutor substitution materials in CR23-0657.

rows.name: Christopher J. Hicks
rows.bio: Elected DA. Named on early case assignment and discovery filings in CR23-0657.

rows.name: Barry L. Breslow
rows.agency: Second Judicial District Court, Washoe County
rows.bio: Presiding judge in CR23-0657. Associated with orders striking pro se filings, Young hearings, competency orders, OSC proceedings, and no-bail warrant issuance.

rows.name: Lindsay Coyle
rows.bio: Authored May 23, 2025 competency report in CR23-0657. Report contains sensitive medical/mental-health information.

rows.name: Rachael Pinkerman
rows.bio: Authored May 28, 2025 competency report. Exhibit index states evaluator found competency under Dusky and noted refusal to participate due to retaliation.

rows.name: Lisa Foerster
rows.bio: Authored June 26, 2025 competency report. Exhibit index states report found competence and described sophisticated understanding of legal process.

rows.name: Cody Meredith
rows.bio: Named in court notes and OSC/pretrial filings in CR23-0657.

stdout:
name	role	agency	bio
Mary Kandaras	Chief Deputy District Attorney	Washoe County District Attorney's Office	Named in defendant's November 29, 2024 pro se sanctions motion alleging intimidation to cease direct communication.
Galen Carrico	Conflict Defense Counsel (Appointed)	Appointed Conflict Counsel	Appointed June 3, 2024 after APD conflict finding. Appeared at December 5, 2024 Young hearing. Filed second Young motion September 2024.
Joel Merchant	Defense Counsel	Defense Counsel	Named in July 2025 substitution of attorney as counsel of record.
Samuel Figueroa	Defense Counsel	Defense Counsel	Substituted in 2025. Moved to withdraw June 6, 2025 citing relationship breakdown and defendant's desire for self-representation. Withdrawal granted August 21, 2025.
Gianna Verness	Defense Counsel (APD)	Washoe County Alternate Public Defender	Named in Young-hearing and APD-conflict materials in 2024.
Sydney Hutt	Defense Counsel (APD)	Washoe County Alternate Public Defender	Substituted in January 2024. Requested Young hearing May 16, 2024. APD office relieved at May 30, 2024 Young hearing.
Cooper Brinson	Defense Counsel (Public Defender)	Washoe County Public Defender / Alternate Public Defender	Initial appointed counsel in CR23-0657. Associated with preliminary-hearing waiver. Arraignment minutes identify him as appointed counsel.
Amos Stege	Deputy District Attorney	Washoe County District Attorney's Office	Filed September 26, 2025 notice of bail-condition violation alleging defendant email to Merchant constituted a threat.
Aziz Merchant	Deputy District Attorney	Washoe County District Attorney's Office	Lead prosecutor in CR23-0657. Appeared at December 5, 2024 Young hearing. Filed or associated with multiple State motions including contempt motion (Jan 2025).
Dianne S. Drinkwater	Deputy District Attorney	Washoe County District Attorney's Office	Identified by Master Evidence Index as DDA on original Reno Justice Court criminal complaint (March 2023).
Nicole Hicks	Deputy District Attorney	Washoe County District Attorney's Office	Appears in 2025 prosecutor substitution materials in CR23-0657.
Christopher J. Hicks	District Attorney	Washoe County District Attorney's Office	Elected DA. Named on early case assignment and discovery filings in CR23-0657.
Barry L. Breslow	District Judge, Department 8	Second Judicial District Court, Washoe County	Presiding judge in CR23-0657. Associated with orders striking pro se filings, Young hearings, competency orders, OSC proceedings, and no-bail warrant issuance.
Lindsay Coyle	Forensic Evaluator	Competency Evaluation Provider	Authored May 23, 2025 competency report in CR23-0657. Report contains sensitive medical/mental-health information.
Rachael Pinkerman	Forensic Evaluator	Competency Evaluation Provider	Authored May 28, 2025 competency report. Exhibit index states evaluator found competency under Dusky and noted refusal to participate due to retaliation.
Lisa Foerster	forensic-evaluator	Competency Evaluation Provider	Authored June 26, 2025 competency report. Exhibit index states report found competence and described sophisticated understanding of legal process.
Cody Meredith	Pretrial Services Officer	Washoe County Pretrial Services	Named in court notes and OSC/pretrial filings in CR23-0657.
